home.tagline: Residential, commercial, industrial, and new construction plumbing with clear communication and careful work. 24/7 emergency response across LA, Orange, and Ventura counties.
home.areasBody: Based in the 818 area, we routinely serve the San Fernando Valley plus LA, Orange, and Ventura counties — 24/7 for emergencies.

services.heading: Services
services.lead: Service, repair, and installation for residential, commercial, industrial, and new construction. Scope and pricing are confirmed on site or after photos and a short phone consult — if we are not the right fit, we say so early.
services.footnote: Not all work is available in every jurisdiction. Permits, inspections, and specialty trades are coordinated as required.

items: Laundry boxes and ice maker lines

groups.title: Gas plumbing
items: Gas line sizing and installation where licensed and permitted

serviceAreas.heading: Service areas
serviceAreas.lead: Dispatch is centered on the San Fernando Valley (818). We routinely cover LA, Orange, and Ventura counties as well, plus surrounding areas. 24/7 emergency response — call any time.
serviceAreas.citiesNote: List is illustrative, not exhaustive. We routinely serve LA, Orange, and Ventura counties — call with your address to confirm availability and same-day options.

about.heading: About
about.intro: {business} is a licensed, bonded, and insured plumbing company serving residential, commercial, industrial, and new construction clients. We focus on predictable scheduling, tidy job sites, and options explained in plain language before work begins — with 24/7 response when emergencies strike.
values: Permits pulled when code requires it
Respect for your time and property
about.credentialsBody: Add license numbers, bonding, insurance carrier, and years in business here when provided by ownership. This block is intentionally plain so legal and marketing can drop in final copy without fighting layout.
about.whyLead: Four habits that make our jobs run smoother than the next plumber's.

whyItems.title: We start where others quit
whyItems.body: Most jobs we walk into look like this. We diagnose what's actually wrong, including whatever the last plumber left behind, before we put a price on it.

whyItems.title: Clean finishes, every time
whyItems.body: Floor protection, drop cloths, lines run straight, and a real walk-through before we pack up. The install should look like the spec, not the demolition.

whyItems.title: Soldered, pressure-tested, labeled
whyItems.body: Joints that hold, lines you can read on inspection day, and the documentation to back it up. We do the boring parts that keep a system running for decades.

whyItems.title: Brazed on the truck, code on the wall
whyItems.body: Copper, gas, and torch work done in-house — not subbed out. If something we did fails early, we come back and make it right.

about.galleryBody: A few shots from recent jobs — what we inherit, how we leave it, and the kind of detail work that doesn't make it onto an invoice.

galleryCaptions.complex: Multi-line repipe — soldered, pressure-tested, and labeled
galleryCaptions.rough: How a typical job starts: the part you don't see in the brochure
galleryCaptions.clean: Clean install ready for the homeowner walk-through
galleryCaptions.torch: Brazing copper on a service call

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Fastest response is a phone call — our line is staffed 24/7 for plumbing emergencies. For non-urgent questions, the form on this page reaches us by email.
contact.hoursBody: We answer calls 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for plumbing emergencies. After-hours and weekend response carries an emergency surcharge — we'll quote it before we roll a truck.
contact.mailBody: Serving the San Fernando Valley, LA County, Orange County, Ventura County, and surrounding areas. Residential, commercial, industrial, and new construction.
contact.note: {business} — 24/7 response on real plumbing jobs. The form below sends straight to our dispatch inbox.

form.heading: Send a message
form.lead: Tell us what's going on. Photos, addresses, and a short description help us quote faster.
form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks — we got it. We'll be in touch shortly.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please call us instead.
form.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

process.heading: From your call to the all-clear
process.lead: Four steps. No surprises. We tell you what we found, what it costs, and what changes — before we start.

call.title: 1. Call or message
call.body: Tell us what's wrong. We'll triage urgency and book the next available slot.

diagnose.title: 2. On-site diagnosis
diagnose.body: We arrive, isolate the issue, and walk you through findings with photos when it helps.

fix.title: 3. Quoted, then fixed
fix.body: Written quote with clear options. Once you approve, we get to work and keep the site tidy.

guarantee.title: 4. Tested & guaranteed
guarantee.body: Final tests, walk-through, and a stand-behind promise on the workmanship.

cta.heading: Burst pipe, no hot water, backed-up drain — call us.
cta.body: 24/7 emergency response. Same-day visits when available. Real humans answering — call us across SFV, LA, Orange & Ventura counties.

beforeAfter.heading: We leave it cleaner than we found it
beforeAfter.body: Drag the slider to see how a typical job comes together — from rough to finished, the work site stays under control.
beforeAfter.bullet1: Floors and counters protected on day one
beforeAfter.bullet2: Old fittings hauled out, debris cleared
beforeAfter.bullet3: Final walk-through before we collect payment
beforeAfter.imageAlt: Before and after of a Cobra Sewer & Drain job — placeholder

gallery.heading: Real jobs, real results
gallery.body: A mix of finished installs, the rough conditions we sometimes inherit, and shots of how we keep work areas clean while jobs are in flight.

items.quote: Showed up on time, told us what was wrong, fixed it the same afternoon. Place was cleaner when they left than when they got here.
items.author: Maria G.

items.quote: Quoted three options before they started — no surprises on the final bill. Will call them again.
items.author: Daniel R.

items.quote: Fast response on a leak that was about to cost us a kitchen remodel. Highly recommended.
items.author: Karen P.

items.quote: Honest, fair, and they actually picked up the phone after hours. That's rare.
items.author: Aaron L.
